query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_vendas,
  COUNT(DISTINCT acquisitionBrokerName) as total_angariadores,
  COUNT(DISTINCT saleBrokerName) as total_vendedores,
  SUM(salePrice) as valor_total_vendas,
  SUM(commissionAmount) as comissao_total
FROM historicalSales
WHERE companyId = 'B I IMOVEIS LTDA';
